narrative_role: Atto I climax. Mostrare che la ciurma ha già affrontato l'impossibile.

prompt_components.shot_type: Wide cinematic shot from low angle, side of the ship
prompt_components.subject: the same antique wooden sailing ship, sails partly furled, being pounded by a massive ocean storm
prompt_components.action: a towering wave rises behind the ship; the ship tilts dangerously to 60 degrees; rain pours sideways; one lightning bolt cracks across the black sky in the background
prompt_components.environment: stormy open sea at night, pitch-black clouds, white-capped waves, heavy rain visible as streaks, no visible land
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow dolly back from the ship side, low to the water, slight roll of the camera with the waves (subtle, not shaky)
prompt_components.lighting: blue-black stormy darkness, lit only by intermittent flashes of lightning that silhouette the ship, ominous and dramatic, completely desaturated except for occasional cold blue lightning rim
prompt_components.mood: epic, dangerous, the trial that forges experience
prompt_components.audio_hint: rolling thunder, heavy rain on wood, howling wind, ship wood creaking under stress, distant crash of waves — NO music

acceptance_criteria: Movimento di camera lento, mai shaky cam
Audio Veo include tuono e legno che cede
